'''Durgard Brarun''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] who served as [[vice-director]] of [[CorDuro Shipping]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. His sister was [[Ducilla Brarun|Ducilla]], and he was [[Marriage/Legends|married]], with a married son. He was an admirer of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], whose reign he had lived through.<ref name="Balance Point" />

When [[Senate Select Committee for Refugees|SELCORE]] approached the [[Duros High House]] about setting up refugee settlements on [[Duro/Legends|Duro]], Brarun was approached by the [[Peace Brigade]] to buy the votes needed, hopping to turn Duro into an ideal target for the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Brarun then had CorDuro ship the supplies intended for the refugees to the [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] [[City/Legends|cities]]. Brarun also took [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] hostage when the Yuuzhan Vong [[Battle of Duro (Yuuzhan Vong War)|attacked Duro]]. Initially, Brarun and CorDuro had agreed to sacrifice one orbital city and spare the other eighteen, while leaving the planet to the Vong. But when the Yuuzhan Vong continued to destroy all but one city, Brarun and several other officials came down to protest. [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]], who had just been defeated by Jacen Solo, instead demanded Solo's name. Once Brarun gave it, Lah imprisoned him in a [[dovin basal]] containment field. Brarun and the other officials were then fed to [[Tu-Scart]].<ref name="Balance Point" />
